bullets: Pray for detained believers in China whose preacher faces deteriorating health in custody, asking God to sustain them and protect the vulnerable congregation of around 30 members left behind.

Lift up the 20 Christians still held hostage in India and the families of three pastors killed returning from a peacebuilding gathering, asking God to secure their release and bring comfort to the grieving.
Ask God to provide water, livelihood, and courage for over 180 Adivasi Christian families in India who have been denied essential resources for three weeks under pressure to renounce their faith.
Pray for students and civilians in Burkina Faso as civic freedoms shrink under military rule, asking God to protect organized voices and guard those navigating an increasingly restricted society.
Lift up the families of tens of thousands killed in the Philippine drug war, asking God for justice to be carried out fairly and for truth to be fully brought to light.
Pray for civilians, sailors, and shipping communities caught between ongoing US-Iran strikes near the Strait of Hormuz, and ask God to guide negotiators toward a durable and just peace.
Ask God to protect the people of Lebanon, especially families grieving losses, sheltering in ruins, or caught between evacuation orders and nowhere safe to go.
Pray for the children and families in Gaza killed or displaced by ongoing strikes, and ask God to move leaders toward an end to the fighting that protects civilian lives.
Lift up the people of eastern Congo, asking God to bring a ceasefire that allows health workers to reach those suffering from both armed violence and the Ebola outbreak.
Ask God to protect foreign workers in South Africa facing threats and violence, and to bring peaceful resolution to tensions over immigration in that country.
Pray for people held in immigration detention facilities in the United States, asking God to ensure humane conditions and dignity for all those in custody.
Lift up civilians and leaders in Guatemala, asking God for transparency and protection of communities caught in the crossfire of drug-related violence.
Ask God to give people in Austria wisdom to counter radicalization and to protect public gatherings from the threat of extremist violence.
Pray for those in Ireland navigating tensions between sport, politics, and conscience over conflict in Gaza, asking God for peaceful and constructive ways to express grief.
Pray for people across Portugal, Italy, France, and Spain who are suffering under record-breaking heatwaves, especially the elderly, children, and those without access to cool shelter.
Lift up communities in Guam who live along the seismically active Pacific Ring of Fire, asking God for safety, calm, and protection from any aftershocks following recent earthquake activity.
Ask God to bring peace and reassurance to residents of Indonesia who felt the ground shake from a recent offshore earthquake, guarding them from fear and harm.
Pray for residents across a coastal region of the United States who were startled by a powerful sonic boom, that any who were injured or deeply frightened would find comfort and recovery.
